docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIA BLANC ZOCO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AGUSTIN CORONADO. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,014.48 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CORONADO, AGUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CORONADO, AGUSTIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORONADO, AGUSTIN $1,372.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,517.00, THE PRINCIPAL OWED AFTER PAYMENTS OF $728.00. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OWE INTEREST AS AMOUNT CHARGED IN EXCESS OF CA FIN 22370(B)(2) ON THE DISCRETIONARY LATE FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 07/07/2017, AS TO DEFENDANT CORONADO, AGUSTIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.00) SERVED JUL-18-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORONADO, AGUSTIN
